title: Celery: task_finished
description: A Celery task completed (success or failure). Emitted by CeleryHoneybadger on the task_postrun signal.

group.description: Celery group ID if the task is part of a group.

args.description: Positional task arguments. Only present when include_args is enabled in insights_config.

kwargs.description: Keyword task arguments (filtered). Only present when include_args is enabled in insights_config.

request_id.description: Request ID propagated from the originating request via Celery task headers.
